title: erigeron scaberrimus
intro: Erigeron scaberrimus, also known as rough fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Erigeron scaberrimus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
